name: Knit Baby Blanket - Green - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your baby covered in warmth with this Knit Baby Blanket from cloud island™. This green knitted blanket makes a delightful addition to your child's nursery or playroom. Made of lightweight knitted material, the blanket feels soft, warm and comfortable against baby's skin. This multipurpose blanket is perfect for adding a cozy layer to baby's bed, and for keeping them warm in the car or outside in the stroller. Plus, it can be machine washed for easy care.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
